construct_parsed.$volume: Volume of the stock on that day.
construct_parsed.TS_PCTCHANGE(A, p): Percentage change in the value of sequence A over p periods.

construct_parsed.$return: Daily return of the stock on that day.
construct_parsed.$volume: Volume of the stock on that day.
construct_parsed.TS_ZSCORE($volume, 20): Z-score of volume over the past 20 days.
construct_parsed.TS_MEAN($return, 20): Mean return over the past 20 days.
